notes: config.platform in composer.json fakes php=8.1.0 and ext-mbstring=1.0.0 for resolution. The lockfile records the faked values under 'platform-overrides', while 'platform' reflects only the require constraints. Faked platform packages (php, ext-mbstring) MUST NOT appear as dependency tree nodes. Only the two Packagist packages resolved under the faked platform are present.

failure_modes_exercised: Mend uses host PHP version instead of config.platform.php for resolution
Mend ignores platform-overrides block and re-resolves against real runtime
faked platform package php leaking into the dependency tree as a node
faked platform package ext-mbstring leaking into the dependency tree as a node
Mend reading 'platform' block instead of 'platform-overrides' block for override context
